title: No TUI visibility into monitor token usage and cost — side-channel LLM calls are invisible
body: Every monitor classification is an LLM call (classify model, typically claude-sonnet). These calls consume tokens and incur cost but are completely invisible in the TUI. No running tally, no per-monitor breakdown, no session total. In a session with active monitors firing on every turn_end, the accumulated cost can be significant. Users have no way to see what monitors are costing them. Need: running tally in TUI showing monitor token usage (input/output) and cost, updated after each classification call.
